hero_subtitle: The smart card that represents you. Share your information with a single tap.
benefit_1_desc: One tap and your information is shared. No apps, no codes, no complications.
benefit_2_desc: Full control of your information. Update your data anytime.
benefit_3_desc: Compatible with any modern smartphone. No apps, no registrations.
product_desc: A premium NFC card designed for professionals who want to make an immediate impression. Share your information with a single tap.
how_1_desc: Touch any NFC‑compatible smartphone. No apps or setup required.
how_2_desc: Your profile opens instantly: social media, contact, portfolio, WhatsApp and more.
how_3_desc: Change your information without buying another card. Always up to date.
test_1_text: An essential tool for networking. People's reaction when I tap their phone is incredible.
test_2_text: It gave me a more professional presence. I no longer carry paper cards. Everything is digital.
test_3_text: The best investment for my personal brand. It's fast, elegant, and always surprises.
contact_desc: Do you have questions or want more information? We're here to help.
prod_card_desc: An NFC card designed for those who demand presence, style, and technology in a single gesture. Matte black finish with glossy CABRÓN NFC engraving — elegant, durable, and built to impress.
prod_card_b5: Perfect for sharing contact, socials, or portfolio
prod_band_desc: A minimalist, comfortable, and durable NFC wristband. Its matte black design with the CABRÓN NFC seal adds effortless style while letting you share your info with a single tap.
prod_sticker_desc: A sleek and discreet NFC sticker, perfect for phones, laptops, or vehicles. Matte black finish with glossy CABRÓN NFC logo — functional, resistant, and aesthetic.
prod_keychain_desc: A robust and sophisticated NFC keychain designed to go everywhere with you. Matte black body with glossy CABRÓN NFC engraving — elegant, durable, and always ready.
prod_keychain_b4: Perfect for keys, backpacks, or cars
